channel_alignment_why_2_lines: The rewrite is clearer and more aligned with reseller ecommerce content norms.
It maintains compliance and professional tone but could enhance SEO with more precise keyword phrase integration.
general_remarks: Generated text avoids overclaims, respecting compliance guidelines.
SEO improvements are clear in Meta Title and Description but some keyword reduction may impact visibility.
Descriptions are more concise and easier to read with professional tone.
Safety warnings are properly maintained and explicit in the long description.
Product benefits and use instructions are clearer and better formatted.
Some keyword optimization is lost compared to original, reducing long tail reach.

per_field_remarks.Titre produit: Corrected casing improves readability and branding.
per_field_remarks.Titre court du produit (60 caractères ma: More compact, but loses some keyword naturalness.
per_field_remarks.Slug: Improved slug enhances SEO with relevant keywords.
per_field_remarks.META Title: Better descriptive title including product benefit terms.
per_field_remarks.META Description: More user-friendly, conversion-oriented and clear description.
per_field_remarks.Description du produit unique/site 400 c: Concise, focused on benefits and compliance, but less detailed.
per_field_remarks.Description courte 600 caractères: Improved clarity, includes usage area and manufacturing info.
per_field_remarks.Description longue: Comprehensive, compliant, and includes explicit safety warnings.
per_field_remarks.Conseils d'utilisation uniques (SEO): Unchanged, well detailed for user clarity and SEO.
per_field_remarks.Mots clés: Reduced keyword breadth may affect long-tail SEO potential.
per_field_remarks.Argu 1: Stronger scientific claim, clearer for consumers.
per_field_remarks.Argu 2: New argument highlights safety and broad suitability.
per_field_remarks.Argu 3: Highlights ease of use and coverage area better.
per_field_remarks.Argu 4: Adds certification detail, reinforcing quality trust.
